name: Vegetable Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables in a mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Stir in matzo meal and let stand 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
5. Form into patties that are 3 -1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Pan fry until browned on both sides. Drain on paper towels. Serve hot.
